name: sd-import
title: SD Import
description: Trigger and manage local SD import jobs
author: xcv58

commands.name: auto-import
commands.title: SD Import Auto
commands.subtitle: Run auto scan for latest mounted card
commands.description: Trigger auto scan + interactive notification flow

commands.name: retry-latest
commands.title: SD Import Retry Latest
commands.subtitle: Retry failed/pending copies
commands.description: Retry copy for the latest job

commands.name: manual-volume-import
commands.title: SD Import Select Volume
commands.subtitle: Pick mounted removable volume manually
commands.description: Select a mounted removable volume and run import/scan

preferences.name: launcherPath
preferences.title: sd-import Path
preferences.description: Absolute path to the sd-import launcher
